restructure_brief:
restructure-single-root-2026q2-r3 — make app.py the ONLY .py file at root with a tree-like dependency structure.

CURRENT STATE (post-r2 HEAD c1dcf89):
- 7 root .py files: app.py, icons.py, parameter_grid.py, render_worker.py, styles.py, surfaces.py, ui_helpers.py
- 4 r2-deferred shims (icons.py, styles.py, ui_helpers.py, render_worker.py) — each Template-2 __getattr__ pointing at _qt/render/ canonicals; M+1 due in r3
- panels/__init__.py hub shim (Template-1 __getattr__) routing panels.X → _qt.panels.X — M+1 due in r3
- surfaces.py 123-LOC re-export hub — 35 import sites in tests/ + app.py + varieties internals; retire by rewriting all callers to import varieties.* directly
- parameter_grid.py — 362 LOC pure-math Qt widget, only real-code file at root besides app.py

TARGET STATE:
- ls *.py → app.py (and only app.py)
- Tree: app.py → _qt/, render/, cross_section/, varieties/ → no cycles
- import-linter contract enforces layer direction in CI

USER DECISIONS LOCKED (2026-05-23):
1. parameter_grid.py → _qt/parameter_grid_math.py (the file is pure math; _qt/ is the right home for a Qt widget)
2. ADD VarietyGenerator PEP-544 Protocol to varieties/types.py for polymorphism / inheritance hygiene
3. ADD import-linter contract enforcing app.py → _qt/render/cross_section/varieties direction; varieties depends on nothing Qt; cross_section depends on nothing Qt

5-BATCH SEQUENCE:
- B1 (TOOLING — must land first): Fix .claude/scripts/repository-architect/rewrite-imports.py partial-attribute-rewrite bug (MED-1 from r2 execution-critic) + exclude .claude/scripts/ and .claude/notes/ from walk
- B2 (MOVE): git mv parameter_grid.py → _qt/parameter_grid_math.py + LibCST rewrite all `from parameter_grid import` callers + add VarietyGenerator Protocol to varieties/types.py
- B3 (SHIM DELETE): Delete the 5 r2 M+1 shims (icons.py, styles.py, ui_helpers.py, render_worker.py, panels/__init__.py hub) + delete tests/test_r2_shims.py + LibCST rewrite any remaining callers
- B4 (HIGH RISK — HUB RETIREMENT): Rewrite all 35 surfaces.py import sites to import from varieties.* directly + delete surfaces.py + LibCST rewrite
- B5 (VERIFY + LOCK-IN): anchor-updater updates CLAUDE.md/README.md/MOVES.md to reflect single-root state + add import-linter contract config + verify `ls *.py | wc -l == 1` + run full test suite + import-time delta check

R2 LESSONS-LEARNED CARRIED FORWARD:
- B1 MUST land first (rewrite-imports.py partial-rewrite caused 11 test failures in r2 B3)
- Commit and push between every batch (user pattern confirmed in r2)
- After agent timeouts, fall back to inline execution (r2 B6-B9 ran inline)
- Cyclic-import smoke test (r2 test-suggester Suggestion 2) should be added to tests/ in B5

PIPELINE OUTPUTS EXPECTED:
- .claude/notes/repository-architect/restructure-single-root-2026q2-r3/audit/ (3 briefs from Phase 1)
- .claude/notes/repository-architect/restructure-single-root-2026q2-r3/design/PLAN.md + symbol-map.json (Phase 2)
- .claude/notes/repository-architect/restructure-single-root-2026q2-r3/preflight/ (baseline + dry-run, Phase 3)
- .claude/notes/repository-architect/restructure-single-root-2026q2-r3/execute/ (per-batch logs, Phase 4)
- .claude/notes/repository-architect/restructure-single-root-2026q2-r3/rectify/ (execution-critic + test-suggester, Phase 5)
- Updated MOVES.md (root rosetta stone) with r3 entries
